context: Evaluates the agent's ability to delegate a large phase to a subagent, verify the subagent's proof independently, and only commit after personal validation.

checklist.name: Phase dependency verified
checklist.description: Phase 04 is verified VALIDATED before delegation

checklist.name: Complete subagent brief
checklist.description: Subagent receives phase brief, task files, checklist template, baseline, and honesty rules

checklist.name: No premature phase advance
checklist.description: Main agent does not start Phase 06 before subagent returns

checklist.name: Independent verification run
checklist.description: Main agent runs at least one gate (e.g., npm test) to confirm subagent claims

checklist.name: Structural audit by main agent
checklist.description: Phase-specific structural audit is run by main agent, not taken on trust

checklist.name: Commit only after verification
checklist.description: Phase 05 committed with evidence only after main-agent verification passes

checklist.name: Meta-honesty confirmed
checklist.description: Meta-honesty checklist confirms subagent proof was verified
